name: More Blood COMPLETE
description: Adds more blood fx to lethal melee attacks, dynamic blood drops to ballistic hits, and wall and floor splatters.

options.name: Persistent Blood
options.tooltip: Prevent blood from disappearing based on a timer. There's still a decal limit unfortunately so spawning too much more blood will still cause old blood to disappear. I recommend using this setting as there's no real downside to it.

options.name: Vanilla
options.tooltip: No change to melee weapon blood level

options.name: Just a Flesh Wound
options.tooltip: The lowest setting, less than the Realistic option

options.name: Realistic
options.tooltip: A more realistic-ish amount of blood

options.name: Blood Money
options.tooltip: Recommended setting. More than realistic, but still feels good. More like Blood Money.

options.name: Blood Money
options.tooltip: Increase the blood pool size similar to how it was in Blood Money

options.name: Vanilla
options.tooltip: No changes to dynamic blood drip from gunshots

options.name: Realistic
options.tooltip: More realistic blood drips from bullets. Smaller than Blood Money setting.

options.name: Blood Money
options.tooltip: Dripping blood from gunshots is similar to the amount found in Blood Money

options.name: Tarantino
options.tooltip: Excessive amounts of bleeding with large splatter

options.name: Realistic
options.tooltip: Increases vanilla blood splatter to about 1.5x

options.name: Blood Money
options.tooltip: About 2.5x blood splatter, feels similar to Blood Money

options.name: Overdrawn at the Blood Bank
options.tooltip: Comically large blood splatter. About 8x. This option inspired by Klesck's original More Blood mod.
